data.title: Bitcoin To Emerge As 'Premier Store Of Value Asset,' Hit $1 Million By 2033, Says Bernstein
data.description: Bernstein Research forecasts Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will evolve into the premier “store of value” asset, ultimately supplanting gold over the next decade.

Meta Readies $10 Billion AI Data Center in Louisiana, Its Largest Facility Globally
data.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. and Louisiana Economic Development announced plans for a $10 billion AI data center in northeast Louisiana, creating 1,500 jobs.
